main_takeaway: Highest simple accuracy among V1-V3, but recall is low and cost is high.
Best overall practical version before V4: strong recall, F1, AUC, and lowest cost.
Stacking improves AUC/F1 over V1, but does not beat V2 on cost or recall.
Auditable cleaned-data XGBoost with selected features; balanced but still below V2 on F1/AUC/cost.
